goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 14:30'.
The train should go to 'peterborough' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of swimmingpool
Make sure you get address and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 14:30
The train should go to peterborough and should leave on friday
Make sure you get price and train ID
